purpose: Sprint 25 Round 1 dimension stability fixture; same scene rendered in three voices for std-of-judge experiments. Quality labels are Claude's authoring intent, not human-validated rankings — R3 will replace this with human-rated calibration anchors.

samples.authoring_intent: head-tier (起点头部签约作 / 烽火戏诸侯式紧致网文)
expected_signals: desire_clarity: high — 玉佩 / 妹妹 / 名册三层欲望叠加
tension_pressure: high — 三更倒计时 + 赵屠多人压力 + 独守
material_specificity: high — 灯油/刀鞘毛刺/笠檐雪/掌心温度
dialogue_voice: high — 哑嗓 vs 沉默
conflict_density: high — 每段一个新钩子
ai_prose_ticks: low
preachiness: false
cliffhanger_pull: applicable, high — 停在更鼓第一声
desire_clarity: medium — 想要保住但不具体
tension_pressure: medium
material_specificity: low — 概念化（'警觉按住''皱起眉头'）
dialogue_voice: low — 人物说话趋同，模板化对白
conflict_density: medium
ai_prose_ticks: low (轻度)
preachiness: false
cliffhanger_pull: applicable, medium

samples.authoring_intent: AI-water (典型 GPT/Claude 默认风格 = 过度比喻 + 排比 + 翻译腔 + 解释性对话 + 段尾说教)
expected_signals: desire_clarity: low — 抽象化
tension_pressure: low — 被修辞稀释
material_specificity: very low — 形容词堆砌
dialogue_voice: very low — 神秘人一次说完背景
conflict_density: low — 大量氛围铺陈
ai_prose_ticks: very high — 宛如/仿佛/排比/翻译腔全集
preachiness: true — '注定不会平静''真正的责任与担当'
cliffhanger_pull: applicable, low — 段尾被升华段冲淡
